channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
3 way stop and go 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation approx 40 metres x3 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 400x400x40mm tarmac patch plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 400x300x40mm tarmac patch (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:

item.title: Branches falling over car park, 19th May
item.description:
Tree branches overhanging fence of left hand side of car park of St Patrick's Church, St Patrick's Court, GL3 4NT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Patrick's Court, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 19th May
item.description:
05/50/26 email rcvd (attached) detailing perceived timing/sequence issues with signals
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 19th May
item.description:
FADED ROAD MARKINGS PLEASE REPAINT 9 X DOUBLE DOTS 12 X SINGLE DOTS 1 X CENTRE LINE STOP AND GO (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree trunk over grown, 19th May
item.description:
Tree outside house overgrown at base and blocking view of road from driveway making it dangerous to exit.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Sydenham Road North, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway pothole footway closure 250x100x70mm stats required number 1 (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
